features.name: gated clock from AND operation
features.description: Code should include a gated clock declared as a wire derived from an AND operation between a clock signal and another signal

features.name: gated clock usage in sequential block
features.description: Code should include an always block using a gated clock (wire derived from clock) in the sensitivity list with posedge

features.name: protect_lib with gated clock sequential logic
features.description: Code should include a gated clock wire declaration followed by an always block using posedge of that gated clock, wrapped in protect_lib context
